name: Canyon Lake Hills
summary: One of the oldest and most established communities around Canyon Lake, offering a mix of waterfront and hill-view properties. Residents enjoy lake access, community boat ramps, and a true lake-life atmosphere.

name: Mystic Shores
summary: A gated Hill Country community with stunning river and canyon views. Mystic Shores offers larger lots, a community pool, and a peaceful setting while still being close to Canyon Lake amenities.

name: Oak Shores Estates
summary: The most exclusive gated community on Canyon Lake, featuring private lakefront estates on large wooded lots. This is the premier address for luxury waterfront living in the Hill Country.

name: Holiday Estates
summary: An established lakeside community with waterfront access and a friendly neighborhood feel. A mix of full-time residents and vacation homeowners enjoy the community park, boat ramp, and lake proximity.

name: Hancock Park
summary: An entry-level lake community near Canyon Lake marina, offering affordable homes close to the water. Popular with first-time buyers and those seeking a weekend lake getaway.

name: River Mountain Ranch
summary: A premier acreage community offering panoramic Hill Country views and spacious homesites. Ideal for buyers seeking privacy, space, and the beauty of the Texas Hill Country with Comal ISD schools.
